blockers.message: Profitability, strategy, optimizer, and convergence evidence maturity is not sufficient for live review or scale-up.

notes: Rechecked in MVP-4. Paper/shadow evidence now separates PAPER scorecard input eligibility from long-run evidence maturity. Long-run evidence requires explicit evidence_window_count/min_required_evidence_window_count and evidence_span_hours/min_required_evidence_span_hours fields; short-window evidence must keep LONG_RUN_PAPER_SHADOW_PROFITABILITY_EVIDENCE_MISSING visible and cannot become live, scale-up, or LIVE_READY evidence.
